title: Electrical Cell Stimulation Process Schema (own)
description: Schema representing key parameters for electrical cell stimulation experiments in tissue engineering and regenerative medicine.

experiment_metadata.description: Metadata about the experiment, including general information and timing.

experiment_name.description: A descriptive name for the experiment.

experiment_description.description: A short description of the experiment and which biological process is addressed.

experiment_date.description: Date when the experiment was started (YYYY-MM-DD).

experiment_time.description: Time when the experiment was started (HH:MM:SS).

experimenter.description: Name or identifier of the experimenter.

cell_culture.description: Parameters related to cell preparation and culture conditions.

cell_type.description: Name of the cell line or primary cell type used (e.g., 'MC3T3-E1', 'human mesenchymal stem cells').

cell_source.description: Source of the cells (e.g., adipose tissue, bone marrow).

passage_number.description: Passage number of the cells used in the experiment.

donor_information.description: Information about the biological source of the cells, including donor age, sex, and tissue harvesting location (if applicable).

age.description: Age of the donor in years.

harvest_location.description: Anatomical site from which tissue was harvested (e.g., abdominal, gluteal).

medium.description: Composition of the cell culture medium including base medium and supplements.

ph_medium.description: pH of complete cell culture medium.

supplement_name.description: Name of the supplement (e.g., FBS, penicillin-streptomycin).

supplement_concentration.description: Concentration of the supplement (e.g., 10% FBS, 1% Penicillin-Streptomycin, 50 μg/mL L-ascorbic acid).

supplements.description: List of supplements used in the cell culture medium.

seeding_density.description: Initial cell density at time of plating (critical for confluency and stimulation response).

seeding_density_unit.description: Unit of measurement (must be cells/cm² for adherent cultures or cells/mL for suspension cultures).

array_support_type.description: Reaction and culture vessels that are used during the experiment (e.g., '6-well plate', 'single flask').

surface_coating.description: Type of surface coating or substrate used (e.g., 'Titanium', 'Poly-L-lysine').

adhesion_time.description: Time allowed for cells to adhere to the surface.

adhesion_time_unit.description: Unit of time measurement (seconds, minutes, or hours).

additional_components.description: Details of additional scaffolds or substrates used for cell plating procedure (if applicable).

scaffold_type.description: Type of scaffold/substrate used (e.g., '3D bioprinted scaffold', 'TiO2 nanotubes', 'polycaprolactone').

percentage.description: Percentage of gas in the mixture.

electrical_stimulation.description: Parameters defining the electrical stimulation configuration.

stimulation_chamber.description: Features of the electrical stimulation chamber.

stimulation_device.description: Device used for electrical stimulation (e.g., 'function generator', 'IsoStim', 'amplifier').

surface_roughness.description: Surface roughness of the electrode in micrometers (μm).

electrode_spacing.description: Distance between the electrodes in millimeters (mm).

electrode_configuration.description: Configuration of electrodes in the chamber (e.g., L-shaped rods, parallel plates).

cell_location.description: Location of cells relative to electrodes.

stimulation_parameters.description: Electrical signal characteristics applied during stimulation.

frequency.description: Stimulation frequency in hertz (Hz). Must be >0 for AC stimulation, 0 for DC stimulation.

waveform.description: Shape of the electrical waveform applied during stimulation.

duty_cycle.description: Duty cycle in percent (for rectangular waves only).

charge_balanced.description: Indicates if the stimulation waveform is charge-balanced to prevent net charge transfer.

electrical_stimulation_duration.description: The total duration of the electrical stimulation experiment.

total_duration_unit.description: Time unit (seconds, minutes, hours, or days).

cycles_per_day.description: Number of stimulation cycles per day.

field_strength_value.description: Numerical electric field strength value (measured, simulated, or calculated from applied voltage and electrode spacing).

field_strength.description: The electric field strength (E-field) is a key parameter in electic stimulation studies and is essential for reproducibility and comparison across experiments.

field_simulation.description: Details of electric field simulation and validation (if applicable).

simulation_method.description: Method used for electric field simulation (e.g., 'FEM', 'analytical calculations').

validation_method.description: Method used to validate electric field distribution.

homogeneous_field.description: Homogeneity of the electric field distribution.

experimental_procedure.description: Step-by-step description of the experimental workflow.

action.description: Primary action performed in this step.

details.description: Additional parameters and specifications for the step (e.g., 'with PBS for 5 min at 37°C').

experimental_analysis.description: Methods and materials used for post-stimulation evaluation.

alkaline_phosphatase_method.description: Method used for alkaline phosphatase analyses.

alkaline_phosphatase_results.description: A list of results from the alkaline phosphatase analyses at different time points.

alkaline_phosphatase_time_value.description: Time points after start of electrical stimulation at which alkaline phosphatase was analyzed.

alkaline_phosphatase_time_unit.description: The unit of time in minutes, hours, or days.

alkaline_phosphatase_result_value_ES.description: Alkaline phosphatase activity level of stimulated group.

alkaline_phosphatase_result_value_contro.description: Alkaline phosphatase activity level of control.

alkaline_phosphatase_result_unit.description: Unit of measurement for alkaline phosphatase activity.

apoptosis_analysis_method.description: Method used for apoptosis assessment (e.g., Annexin V staining, TUNEL assay).

apoptosis_results.description: A list of results from the apoptosis analyses at different time points.

apoptosis_analysis_time_value.description: Time points after start of electrical stimulation at which apoptosis analysis was performed.

apoptosis_analysis_time_unit.description: The unit of time in minutes, hours, or days.

apoptosis_result_ES.description: Percentage of apoptotic cells of stimulated group.

apoptosis_result_control.description: Percentage of apoptotic cells of control.

calcium_ion_signaling_method.description: Method used for calcium ion detection.

calcium_ion_signaling_results.description: A list of results from the calcium ion detection at different time points.

calcium_ion_signaling_time_value.description: Time points after start of electrical stimulation at which calcium signals were analyzed.

calcium_ion_signaling_time_unit.description: The unit of time in minutes, hours, or days.

calcium_deposition_method.description: Method used for calcium deposition analyses.

calcium_deposition_results.description: A list of results from the calcium deposition analyses at different time points.

calcium_deposition_time_value.description: Time points after start of electrical stimulation at which calcium deposition was analyzed.

calcium_deposition_time_unit.description: The unit of time in minutes, hours, or days.

calcium_deposition_result_value_ES.description: Calcium deposition level of stimulated group.

calcium_deposition_result_unit.description: Unit of measurement for calcium deposition.

method.description: Method used for cell cycle analysis (e.g., EdU assay, flow cytometry).

cell_cycle_results.description: A list of results from the cell cycle analyses at different time points.

cell_cycle_analysis_time_value.description: Time points after start of electrical stimulation at which cell cycle analysis was performed.

cell_cycle_analysis_time_unit.description: The unit of time in minutes, hours, or days.

G0_G1.description: Percentage of cells in G0/G1 phase.

S.description: Percentage of cells in S phase.

G2_M.description: Percentage of cells in G2/M phase.

sub_G1.description: Percentage of cells in sub-G1 phase (indicating apoptosis).

cytoskeleton_orientation.description: Analysis of cytoskeleton orientation relative to the electric field.

cytoskeleton_orientation_measurement_met.description: Method used for measuring cytoskeleton orientation.

cytoskeleton_orientation_angle.description: Angle of cytoskeleton orientation in degrees.

cytoskeleton_orientation_percentage.description: Percentage of cells with cytoskeleton aligned perpendicular to the electric field.

electrical_impedance_spectroscopy.description: Impedance measurements taken during the experiment.

method.description: Method used for impedance measurement (e.g., three-point method, four-point method).

hydrogen_peroxide_method.description: The method used for the H2O2 measurements.

hydrogen_peroxide_measurement_results.description: A list of results from the H2O2 measurements at different time points.

hydrogen_peroxide_time_value.description: Time point after start of electrical stimulation at which H2O2 was measured.

hydrogen_peroxide_time_unit.description: The unit of time in minutes, hours, or days.

hydrogen_peroxide_concentration_ES.description: The H2O2 concentration of ES group.

hydrogen_peroxide_unit.description: The unit of the H2O2 concentration.

imaging.description: Imaging-specific parameters (required only if imaging is in investigation_methods).

temporal.description: Temporal resolution in seconds or milliseconds (e.g., frame rate).

resolution.description: Resolution characteristics of the imaging device.

magnification.description: Magnification level used (e.g., 10x, 20x, 40x, 60x). Write number only.

primary_antibodies.description: List of primary antibodies used for specific protein detection in fluorescence imaging.

nuclei_aspect_ratio.description: Analysis of nuclei aspect ratio indicating cell elongation.

nuclei_aspect_ratio_measurement_method.description: Method used for measuring nuclei aspect ratio.

nuclei_aspect_ratio_result.description: Individual measurements of nuclei aspect ratio.

pH_level.description: pH level measurements during the experiment.

pH_level_method.description: The method used for the pH measurements.

pH_level_measurement_results.description: A list of results from the viability assay at different time points.

pH_level_time_value.description: Time point after start of electrical stimulation at which pH was measured.

pH_level_time_unit.description: The unit of time in minutes, hours, or days.

pH_level_value_ES.description: The pH value of stimulated group.

cell_number_results.description: A list of results from the cell number measurement at different time points.

cell_number_time_value.description: Time points at which the cell number was analyzed.

cell_number_time_unit.description: The unit of time in minutes, hours, or days.

cell_number_ES.description: Number of cells in stimulated samples.

surface_coverage_results.description: A list of results from the surface coverage measurement at different time points.

surface_coverage_time_value.description: Time points after start of electrical stimulation at which the surface coverage was analyzed.

surface_coverage_time_unit.description: The unit of time in minutes, hours, or days.

surface_coverage_ES.description: Percentage of surface coverage in stimulated samples.

surface_coverage_control.description: Percentage of surface coverage in controls.

ROS_results.description: A list of results from the ROS measurements at different time points.

ROS_measurement_time_value.description: Time points after start of electrical stimulation at which ROS was analyzed.

ROS_measurement_time_unit.description: The unit of time in minutes, hours, or days.

viability_assay.description: Results from the viability assay, typically using alamarBlue or similar methods.

viability_assay_method.description: The method used for the viability assay (e.g., 'alamarBlue', 'MTT').

viability_assay_results.description: A list of results from the viability assay at different time points.

viability_assay_time_value.description: The time point after begin of the stimulation experiment at which the viability assay was conducted.

viability.description: The viability percentage relative to the control at the given time point.

assay_type.description: List of analytical techniques used to assess stimulation effects.

metric.description: Name of the metric being measured (e.g., cell proliferation rate, protein expression, ALP activity).

quantitative_data_value_ES.description: Measured value of the metric of stimulated group.

quantitative_data_value_control.description: Measured value of the metric of control.

quantitative_data_unit.description: Unit of measurement (e.g., %, intensity, number of cells).

additional_quantitative_data.description: Additional quantitative data related to the experiment outcomes.
